# services.pihole-web

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.pihole-web`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.pihole-web.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Pi-hole dashboard. |
| `services.pihole-web.hostName` | `string` | Domain name for the website. |
| `services.pihole-web.package` | `package` | The pihole-web package to use. |
| `services.pihole-web.ports` | `list of (16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive) or string or (submodule))` | Port(s) for the webserver to serve on. If provided as a string, optionally append suffixes to control behaviour: - `o`: to make the port is optional - failure to bind will not be an error. - `s`: for the port to be used for SSL. - `r`: for a non-SSL port to redirect to the first available SSL port. |
